description: Replace time-decay exit (40 bars) with ATR-based fixed R-multiple exit (3x ATR take-profit) for cleaner trend capture.

Remove redundant Donchian short-exit rail to let trailing stop capture more of trending moves; keep ATR stop and time-decay as the two complementary exit rails.

Add directional indicator (+DI > -DI) filter to entry — only take breakouts when upward momentum dominates, improving win rate.
Recent 2 crashes from over-filtering; widen entry by lowering ADX threshold from 25 to 22 to increase trade count while keeping trend-following discipline.
Increase time-decay exit from 30 to 40 bars to let winning trends run longer while retaining a ceiling on holding time.
Increase time-decay exit from 40 to 50 bars to let winning trends run longer while retaining a ceiling on holding time.
Increase volatility scaling ceiling to 1.5 to allow larger positions in low-vol regimes, capturing more trend profits while tail risk remains capped by ATR trailing stops.
Add partial profit-taking exit: close 50% when price >= entry + 3×ATR to lock gains and reduce drawdown.
Fix partial profit-taking crash: use position.close(portion=0.5) instead of self.sell(size=self.position.size/2) to correctly halve fractional position sizes.
Remove the +DI > -DI directional filter that reduced sharpe from 1.869 to 1.518 – reverting to the configuration that produced the best result so far.
Make time exit regime-adaptive: exit after 30 bars in low volatility vs 50 bars in high volatility, letting strong trends run while preventing chop.
Increase ATR trailing stop multipliers (2.5→3.0 low-vol, 3.0→3.5 high-vol) to give trades more room, reducing premature exits and capturing more trend.
Increase base fraction from 0.55 to 0.70 to increase position sizes in low-vol regimes and capture more trend profit, leveraging the current low drawdown headroom.
Remove time-decay exit to let trades run indefinitely until stopped out by ATR trailing stop. Simplifies exit to single rail.
